items.title: US filings for jobless aid rise modestly to 212K as layoffs remain at healthy levels
items.description: Slightly more Americans applied for unemployment benefits last week as layoffs remain at relatively healthy levels

items.title: IMF releasing $2.3 billion to Egypt after reforms help to stabilize the economy
items.description: The IMF is letting Egypt tap about $2.3 billion more from its loan program after it says reforms are steadying the economy

items.title: Wall Street futures unchanged before the bell after Nvidia earnings beat expectations
items.description: U.S. futures were in a holding pattern after stronger-than-expected earnings from chipmaker Nvidia helped ease some investor worries over the artifici...

items.title: Fire at an Ohio farm complex kills about 6,000 hogs and smoke is visible for miles
items.description: A fire chief says a fire at an Ohio hog farm complex has killed about 6,000 of the animals

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo buys stake in Saudi-owned second-tier Spanish club
items.description: A consulting firm representing Cristiano Ronaldo says the Portuguese soccer star has purchased a stake in Spanish second-division club Almeria
